# TinyClaw

> Deploy your own AI agent platform as easily as spinning up WordPress.

TinyClaw is a self-hosted, multi-tenant AI agent platform for teams. It supports organizations, profiles, soul files, builtin tools, skills, MCP servers, and channels like web, CLI, Telegram, and WhatsApp.

Maintainer: Ahmad Rosid (Creator and maintainer of TinyClaw)
Website: https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/
Repository: https://github.com/ahmadrosid/tinyclaw

## AI-friendly access

- Markdown mirrors are available for docs pages at the same path with a `.md` suffix.
- Canonical HTML pages are available under the main docs site.

## Docs

- [Home](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/index.md): Self-hosted AI agents for teams with profiles, tools, channels, and multi-tenant workspaces.
- [Getting Started](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/getting-started.md): Install TinyClaw with Bun or Docker, run the server, and complete first-time setup.
- [Overview](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/overview.md): Understand the TinyClaw mental model: organizations, profiles, tools, and channels.
- [Multi Tenancy](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/multi-tenancy.md): Learn how organizations, roles, and tenant isolation work in TinyClaw.
- [Profiles](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/profiles.md): See how TinyClaw profiles define bot behavior, soul files, tools, and model selection.
- [Agent Prompt](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/agent-prompt.md): Understand how TinyClaw builds the final system prompt from soul files, tools, and runtime context.
- [Builtin Tools](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/builtin-tools.md): Review the builtin tools that TinyClaw profiles can use, including persistent artifact saving and file access boundaries.
- [Skills](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/skills.md): Learn how reusable skills extend TinyClaw profiles with focused workflows.
- [MCP Servers](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/mcp.md): Connect external MCP servers to TinyClaw profiles and expose new tools safely.
- [Telegram](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/telegram.md): Set up TinyClaw as a Telegram bot with pairing, commands, and group behavior.
- [WhatsApp](https://ahmadrosid.github.io/tinyclaw/whatsapp.md): Set up TinyClaw on WhatsApp with linking, commands, and troubleshooting.
